nasb.text: Then Jeremiah said to Zedekiah, “If I tell you, will you not certainly put me to death? Besides, if I give you advice, you will not listen to me.”

esv.text: Jeremiah said to Zedekiah, “If I tell you, will you not surely put me to death? And if I give you counsel, you will not listen to me.”

cnv.text: 耶利米對西底家說：“我若告訴你，你不是要殺死我嗎？我若向你建議，你必不聽從我。”

ccb.text: 耶利米说：“我若从实禀告，你一定会杀我。我就是给你建议，你也不会听。”
